demographic_audit_note: Verified Medicare Advantage PPO; confirmed home address in Silver Spring, MD; DOB 1954 matches face sheet; updated daughter's mobile as the primary transition contact.
home_vs_ltc_determination: Home. SW confirms patient is a candidate for home PT and nursing following L4-L5 spinal fusion.
weekly_facility_update: Week 2: Patient meeting 50ft gait goals; SW identifies 'CareLink HHA' for post-acute services. Target discharge set for Thursday.
v_card_and_flyer_status: V-Card saved to patient's iPhone contacts; physical program flyer delivered to daughter during bedside education session.
pre_dc_pulse_call_result: Reached daughter 24h prior; home environment confirmed with raised toilet seat and walker; daughter aware of Friday morning MA visit.
atlantis_final_sync: Discharge date of Thursday and first visit date of Friday morning entered into Atlantis queue.
ma_visit_booking: MA scheduled for Friday at 09:30 AM, ensuring the visit occurs within the 24-hour post-discharge window.
narrative_summary: The patient was triaged following a spinal fusion with demographics successfully audited in Atlantis. During the maintenance phase, the PN provided program education and inserted the V-Card while the SW finalized the HHA selection. Despite the HHA intake coordinator being unavailable due to illness, the PN flagged the communication gap to the SW early, allowing for a confirmed Friday morning first visit and securing the incentive.

format_2_triples.situation: HHA intake coordinator out sick, stalling the confirmation of the Friday start-of-care.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Flagged the HHA unresponsiveness to the Social Worker to request an alternate agency contact.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Escalating to SW for resolution: Flagged the HHA unresponsiveness to the Social Worker to request an alternate agency contact.

format_2_triples.situation: Family expressed confusion over the timing of the first home visit.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Walked the family through the Day 1 expectations, including the 24-hour MA visit window.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Educating on program expectations: Walked the family through the Day 1 expectations, including the 24-hour MA visit window.

format_2_triples.situation: Atlantis demographics for the patient listed an outdated phone number.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Audited the facility face sheet and updated the patient record in Atlantis with the correct contact info.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Verifying logistics and data accuracy: Audited the facility face sheet and updated the patient record in Atlantis with the correct contact info.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: The PN documents the HHA intake coordinator's absence in Atlantis and waits for the Social Worker to resolve the communication delay during the next business day.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Respects the SW's role as the primary liaison with the HHA, ensuring no overstep into agency management.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: The PN flags the intake coordinator's illness to the SW and verifies with the HHA's general office that the referral was received, then schedules the MA for the 24-hour window.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Follows Stage 3 checklist by escalating barriers to the SW while maintaining scheduling anchors for the MA visit.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: The PN calls the HHA clinical director directly to provide the missing F2F documentation and suggests a different HHA to the SW to avoid the intake delay.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Violates the Banned Actions by handling F2F forms and suggesting alternative HHA agencies to the SW.
